title: paesia anfractuosa
intro: Paesia anfractuosa, also known as the curled lip fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paesia anfractuosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Paesia anfractuosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
